prestazioni: Engine swap to a K10C Boosterjet turbocharged 1.0L (from Suzuki Swift Sport) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by HKS, paired with a Garrett GT1549 turbocharger and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust system with 304 stainless steel headers for optimized scavenging on the R06A 660cc engine bay constraints

Full Ohlins DFV (Dual Flow Valve) coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Jimny Sierra's 2,250mm wheelbase and 1,395mm track width, including reinforced top mounts by Cusco to handle off-road stress loads

Standalone Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with a custom wiring harness by Link G4+, integrated with a K&N cold air intake and a custom intercooler setup using a Mishimoto JDM-spec aluminum core, paired with a Motec PDM15 for precise power delivery to the Jimny's part-time 4WD system
estetica: Rocket Bunny Jimny Sierra-specific widebody kit (RB-JM1) with carbon fiber fender flares and a custom front splitter, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a functional heat extractor for the K10C turbo setup

Custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar and rear shock tower gussets, powder-coated in RAL 3001 (Signal Red) to match the OEM Suzuki Racing Red paint code (1K0)

BBS RG-R 15x7.5 ET0 wheels with 4x139.7 PCD, wrapped in Toyo Open Country M/T tires (215/75R15) for a 3% stretch, paired with DBA 4000 Series slotted rotors and Project Mu B-M4 brake pads for improved heat dissipation on the Jimny's 4-wheel drum brake rear end
